nasb.text: They shall eat equal portions, except what they receive from the sale of their fathers’ estates.

esv.text: then he may have equal portions to eat, besides what he receives from the sale of his patrimony.

cnv.text: 除了他從父家承受的產業以外，他還可以得著和他的兄弟相等分量的祭物。

ccb.text: 除了变卖产业所得之外，他还可以分到与其他祭司同等分量的祭物。
